title: [clang][ASan][Fuchsia] Have Fuchsia use a dynamic shadow start
author: PiJoules
description: These are the compiler changes that depend on the runtime changes in https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/pull/183154. The runtime changes need to have landed first. The dynamic shadow global is still set to zero, but this will change in the future.

comments.author: github-actions[bot]
